Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

Necati Alp Tabak graduated from Maltepe University Faculty of Medicine in 2007. Completing his specialty education in the field of Radiology at Israel Hadassah-İbrahim University Faculty of Medicine, Tabak works as an Assistant Professor in the Radiology Department of Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine.
